tests.not_run_because: Read-only inspection task; no product code modified.

acceptance.criterion: state/latest-worker-result.json contains fresh run_id, iteration, task_id, and created_at fields matching the current loop state
The report explains what Locaily is in one or two sentences
acceptance.evidence: Locaily is a local-first AI coordination stack whose Local Brain (companion/server.js) dispatches manifest-backed tool packs and multi-step tracks on the user's machine, mixing small local models, deterministic tools, validators, and audit trails.

acceptance.criterion: The report names the current active build slice
acceptance.evidence: Active build slice: 'Canonical Track Run Records' (first Track Learning Evidence Loop).

acceptance.criterion: The report lists the two proof workflow track ids
The report includes the exact read-only commands run and their summarized outputs
acceptance.evidence: Commands: git status --short; git branch --show-current (output: two untracked .opencode/agents/history files, branch agents/worker/controller-validation), Get-ChildItem companion/pit-crew/tracks (dealsniper.track.json, lighthouse-handoff.track.json, operator-log-discovery.track.json, operator-log-draft.track.json), Get-ChildItem tool-packs (editorial-pack, lighthouse-parser-pack, standard-text-pack).

artifact.notes: Read-only inspection completed. No product code or docs were modified. The companion/pit-crew/tracks directory contains four track files; the two active proof workflows are lighthouse-handoff and dealsniper. Tool-packs has three manifest-backed packs.
